Report to Intellect

Sent to Intellect Command Center
Help us add a parser for a new format — warrant returns, RMS reports, DMV printouts, cell-tower dumps, mobile-forensics bundles, anything else. VIPER walks the file/folder/ZIP locally and builds a shape-only envelope (folder layout, file types, key/column names) with all filenames redacted. No case content, narratives, names, or attachments are uploaded.
Shape-only — no case content uploaded
